title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell, CEO of Cursor, presents data on the rapid shift toward AI-assisted code generation and autonomous agents in software engineering. He reports that 30% of Cursor PRs are fully agent-developed, enterprise AI-generated code rose from 15% to 75% in a year, and engineers increasingly manage parallel agent teams rather than write code directly.
